Find Largest Digit

Write a Java program to find the largest digit in a given number.

package day3;

public class Program16_Largestdigit {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		int num=59371;
		int large=0;
		while(num>0)
		{
			int digit=num%10;
			if(digit>large)
			{
				large=digit;
			}
			num=num/10;
		}
		System.out.println("Largest digit is : "+large);

	}

}

Example:
Input: 59371
Output: 9
